name: Anne Knudsen Park
description: Come play pickleball at Anne Knudsen Park in United States, HI! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights. The courts are free.

description: Bryan J. Baptiste Sports Complex is a place to play pickleball in Kapaa, HI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. Players have access to lights.

name: Koloa Public Tennis Courts
description: 4 newly opened courts with permanent nets and lines. 2 additional courts with permanent lines but bring your own net. Water fountain. Beautiful, recently resurfaced. Drop in and mostly busy morning hours.
open_play_schedule: Drop in ..some 3.5 and 4.0 .. not a place for beginners

name: Lae Nani
description: Lae Nani is a place to play pickleball in Kapaa, HI. There is 1 outdoor concrete court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Reservations are not available.
